klayer Test Document — Plain Text

This is a plain text file used to test klayer's ingest pipeline.
klayer should pass this through directly without any HTML or PDF parsing.

SDLC Best Practices:
- Plan before coding; define acceptance criteria upfront.
- Shift-left on security: find issues early, not in production.
- Keep CI/CD pipelines fast; slow pipelines kill developer flow.
- Code review every change; fresh eyes catch what the author misses.
- Deploy small, deploy often; big releases are big risks.

Clean Code Rules:
- Names should reveal intent; if you need a comment to explain a name, rename it.
- Functions do one thing only.
- Don't repeat yourself; extract duplication into a single authoritative source.
- You aren't gonna need it; build what is required today, not tomorrow.
